text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-O-Opera O, today we're having a sh-show!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-O-Opera O, are we having a sh-showdown
today?

It's the day of the Japan Cup. Over at the
paddock...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-O-Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What is it, Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Today, we're having a... having a...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: SHOWDOOOWN!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

All our practice comes to fruition—Meisho Doto
successfully establishes their rivalry.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe my ears! Doto... what are you
saying?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why? My most beloved subject has chosen to
betray me?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaagh! She's mad... Opera O is really mad...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I know not mercy! Anger, rage, broils within me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My head burns, burns, burns! Ready to explode! If
it's a showdown you want, a showdown you will
get! ♪ (You will geeet!)

In comes an impromptu musical show. I figured
the news wouldn't be enough to phase her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto! Are you sure this is what you want? To
enter the Japan Cup not as my comrade, but as
my enemy?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes... And I will definitely win against you,
Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Then, stand against me with all
your might. My Overlord dash will cut you to
pieces!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I w-won't let that happen. I'll zoom right past you!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

Things are heating up from all the theatrics. The
crowd must be feeling the change in attitude.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, Doto, I'm more than happy to oblige. Give
me everything you've got. However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Know I'm not a fan of half-hearted performances.
I won't let you off easy, should you not fulfill my
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: U-understood!
